programme.title: Quiz Lady
programme.desc: A game show-obsessed young woman and her estranged train wreck of a sister must work together to help cover their mother's gambling debts. Contains very strong language.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Vivek Singh and Donna Hay, and by special guest Lucy Beaumont. Drinks expert Olly Smith picks the wines to go with the studio dishes.

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chris explores Arberth's indie food scene, from Spanish tapas and wild Welsh vermouth to Dexter beef, foraging, and a fire-cooked feast celebrating Pembrokeshire creativity.

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: A preview of the weekend, plus a Scott McTominay interview ahead of the World Cup.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A marathon runner completes a marathon seven-year project to transform a site in Llanfynydd into smart holiday accommodation.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and the teams shop for antiques in Shropshire, with help from experts Charles Hanson and Ben Cooper. Charlie also meets a woman with a collection of 5,000 model cars.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 15 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad and guests bring you all the goals, latest news, analysis, reaction and interviews from the afternoon's biggest football matches.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Phil Wang, Anna Williamson, Miles Jupp and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell face the Bridge of Lies.

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Joe Marler, Sue Perkins, Trevor Nelson, Josh Pugh, Tasha Ghouri and Sara Barron try to fill in the missing blanks and win prizes for some lucky contestants.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Stacey Dooley bravely hands over her phone in Send to All, Olly Murs performs his single Dancing on Cars, and there's a rude awakening for Alexander Armstrong in the Midnight Gameshow.

programme.title: The Weakest Link: Doctors and Nurses Special
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants in this TV medics special include Dr Ranj Singh and Kirsty Mitchell.

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: The paramedics face a life-and-death situation in the call centre. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy are extras on the set of a famous TV mini-series. Unfortunately, Lee gets ideas above his station and sets his sights on an acting role. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of five Premier League games as title-chasing Arsenal take on Fulham at the Emirates and Brighton continue their push for European football next season at Newcastle.

programme.title: Elliot Anderson: The Football Interview
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest and England midfielder Elliot Anderson talks to Kelly Somers.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An undercover cop pursuing a gang of bank robbers is seduced by the LA surf scene. Contains very strong language and some violent scenes.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of five Premier League games as title-chasing Arsenal take on Fulham at the Emirates and Brighton continue their push for European football next season at Newcastle.

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: The big names behind the big stories. Laura Kuenssberg talks to those making the news, inside and outside politics.

programme.title: Politics London
programme.desc: The latest political news, interviews and debate.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Six troll tribes clash over their devotion to different types of music. Queen Poppy has to prevent Queen Barb of the rock tribe from destroying all other music.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: Songs of Praise: Claire McCollum's Faith Journey
programme.desc: Aled Jones is in Belfast with fellow presenter Claire McCollum to hear about the people, places and hymns that have shaped her life and faith.

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers have their say on the BBC's television shows. Email your thoughts to pov@bbc.co.uk.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 16 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals how tawny owls, badgers, dormice and bumblebees have made a home in a beautiful woodland garden hidden at the bottom of a steep-sided Welsh valley.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Vick Hope explore the chalk landscapes of the Chilterns, where rare grasslands, seasonal streams and specialised wildlife all depend on the fragile ground beneath their feet.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals how a remote garden on Scotland's west coast has become an oasis for barn owls and pine martens as they battle the elements to feed, breed and survive.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow goes to Belmont House in Kent, where treasures include a piece of HMS Bounty and a collection of sneakers, while Fiona gets to foxtrot with guest Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Making Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: The epic story of the blockbuster series that changed David Attenborough's life forever.

programme.title: The Cage
programme.desc: Gary realises someone is skimming, and Matty and Leanne panic. Ning pressures Matty. Contains strong language and some violent scenes.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Kelly Cates presents highlights of three Premier League matches. Manchester United host Liverpool, Aston Villa are at home against Tottenham Hotspur and Crystal Palace travel to Bournemouth.

programme.title: The Women's Football Show
programme.desc: The big names and the big games from the Women's Super League, with highlights and analysis of all the action.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: It's a family affair as Steve Fletcher fixes a model watermill while son Fred brings a cherished clock back to life. The team also fix a stunning Notting Hill Carnival headpiece.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.
